name: Chicken Breasts Xeres
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess skin from the chicken breasts.
2. Sprinkle the breasts with salt and pepper, then set aside.
3. Quarter larger mushrooms; halve smaller ones. Set aside.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a skillet over high heat.
5. Brown the chicken on the skin side. Transfer to a plate and pour off fat.
6. Reduce heat to medium. Pour vinegar into the pan and dissolve tomato paste with it.
7. Return the chicken (skin side up) to the skillet. Cover and cook for 3 minutes.
8. Uncover and cook until the chicken is done, about 6 minutes.
9. While the chicken cooks, heat another teaspoon of olive oil in a frying pan. Cook the mushrooms for 3-to-4 minutes.
10. Arrange chicken and mushrooms on a serving platter.
11. Whisk remaining olive oil into parsley mixture.
12. Pour collected juices over chicken and mushrooms.
13. Serve immediately.
